creator: pst@Shockwave.COM
text:
Install is going just fine, the manual pages extract and I get:

"Fatal signal 11 caught! I'm dead."

on VTY2, the last messages were:

DEBUG: Parsing attributes file for distribution proflibs
DEBUG: Aborting FTP connection
DEBUG: FTP shutdown called.  FTP = 197880

How-To-Repeat: 
Try to install 951026 on an empty machine via ftp from a user-specified URL
with proflibs empty.
